inputs.label: Guest Count
inputs.businessContext: The total number of wedding guests to be served cake, determines the total quantity needed and drives portion sizing to avoid shortage or excess.

businessContext_i18n.en: The total number of wedding guests to be served cake, determines the total quantity needed and drives portion sizing to avoid shortage or excess.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Düğün misafirlerine servis edilecek toplam pasta sayısı, gereken toplam miktarı belirler ve eksiklik veya fazlalığı önlemek için porsiyon boyutlandırmasını yönlendirir.
businessContext_i18n.de: Die Gesamtzahl der Hochzeitsgäste, die mit Kuchen versorgt werden sollen, bestimmt die benötigte Gesamtmenge und beeinflusst die Portionsgröße, um Mangel oder Überschuss zu vermeiden.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Le nombre total d'invités à servir détermine la quantité totale nécessaire et le dimensionnement des portions pour éviter le manque ou l'excès.

inputs.label: Portion Size
inputs.businessContext: Average weight of a single serving of cake in grams, based on typical dessert portions; affects total cake mass and ingredient requirements.

businessContext_i18n.en: Average weight of a single serving of cake in grams, based on typical dessert portions; affects total cake mass and ingredient requirements.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tipik tatlı porsiyonlarına dayalı olarak gram cinsinden tek bir pasta diliminin ortalama ağırlığı; toplam pasta kütlesini ve içerik gereksinimlerini etkiler.
businessContext_i18n.de: Durchschnittsgewicht einer einzelnen Kuchenportion in Gramm, basierend auf typischen Dessertportionen; beeinflusst die Gesamtkuchenmasse und den Zutatenbedarf.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Poids moyen d'une portion individuelle de gâteau en grammes, basé sur les portions de dessert typiques ; affecte la masse totale du gâteau et les besoins en ingrédients.

inputs.label: Ingredient Cost per kg
inputs.businessContext: Cost of raw materials (flour, sugar, eggs, etc.) per kilogram; fundamental for calculating the base food cost of the cake.

businessContext_i18n.en: Cost of raw materials (flour, sugar, eggs, etc.) per kilogram; fundamental for calculating the base food cost of the cake.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kilogram başına hammadde (un, şeker, yumurta vb.) maliyeti; pastanın temel gıda maliyetini hesaplamak için temel oluşturur.
businessContext_i18n.de: Kosten für Rohstoffe (Mehl, Zucker, Eier usw.) pro Kilogramm; grundlegend für die Berechnung der Lebensmittelkosten des Kuchens.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coût des matières premières (farine, sucre, œufs, etc.) par kilogramme ; fondamental pour calculer le coût alimentaire de base du gâteau.

inputs.label: Labor Hours
inputs.businessContext: Total direct labor time spent on baking and decorating the cake; used to compute labor expense.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total direct labor time spent on baking and decorating the cake; used to compute labor expense.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Pastanın pişirilmesi ve süslenmesi için harcanan toplam doğrudan işçilik süresi; işçilik giderini hesaplamak için kullanılır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamte direkte Arbeitszeit für das Backen und Dekorieren des Kuchens; wird zur Berechnung der Arbeitskosten verwendet.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Temps de travail direct total consacré à la cuisson et à la décoration du gâteau ; utilisé pour calculer les dépenses de main-d'œuvre.

inputs.label: Labor Rate
inputs.businessContext: Hourly wage of the pastry chef or baker; multiplied by labor hours to get total labor cost.

businessContext_i18n.en: Hourly wage of the pastry chef or baker; multiplied by labor hours to get total labor cost.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Pastacı şefinin veya fırıncının saatlik ücreti; toplam işçilik maliyetini elde etmek için işçilik saatleriyle çarpılır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Stundenlohn des Konditors oder Bäckers; multipliziert mit den Arbeitsstunden ergibt die gesamten Arbeitskosten.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Salaire horaire du pâtissier ou du boulanger ; multiplié par les heures de travail pour obtenir le coût total de la main-d'œuvre.

inputs.label: Overhead Percentage
inputs.businessContext: Indirect costs (utilities, rent, equipment amortization) expressed as a percentage of direct costs (ingredients + labor); ensures full cost recovery.

businessContext_i18n.en: Indirect costs (utilities, rent, equipment amortization) expressed as a percentage of direct costs (ingredients + labor); ensures full cost recovery.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Doğrudan maliyetlerin (içerikler + işçilik) yüzdesi olarak ifade edilen dolaylı maliyetler (elektrik, kira, ekipman amortismanı); tam maliyet geri kazanımını sağlar.
businessContext_i18n.de: Indirekte Kosten (Betriebskosten, Miete, Geräteabschreibung) als Prozentsatz der direkten Kosten (Zutaten + Arbeit); stellt die vollständige Kostendeckung sicher.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coûts indirects (services publics, loyer, amortissement de l'équipement) exprimés en pourcentage des coûts directs (ingrédients + main-d'œuvre) ; assure la récupération complète des coûts.

inputs.label: Profit Margin
inputs.businessContext: Desired net profit as a percentage of total cost; used to set the final selling price and ensure business sustainability.

businessContext_i18n.en: Desired net profit as a percentage of total cost; used to set the final selling price and ensure business sustainability.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Toplam maliyetin yüzdesi olarak istenen net kâr; nihai satış fiyatını belirlemek ve iş sürdürülebilirliğini sağlamak için kullanılır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gewünschter Nettogewinn als Prozentsatz der Gesamtkosten; dient zur Festlegung des endgültigen Verkaufspreises und zur Sicherstellung der Nachhaltigkeit des Unternehmens.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Bénéfice net souhaité en pourcentage du coût total ; utilisé pour fixer le prix de vente final et assurer la durabilité de l'entreprise.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
